global.title: Tesla increases Actually Smart Summon speed by 33% in new FSD update
global.summary: Tesla is rolling out FSD V14.3.3 today, and among the changes is a 33% speed increase to Actually Smart Summon — the feature now tops out at 8 mph, up from the 6 mph cap (less impressive when you put it like that). The speed bump is part of a broader update (software version 2026.14.6.6) that also m

global.title: Amazon is deploying these massive cargo e-bikes for deliveries
global.summary: Amazon is officially rolling out e-cargo bike deliveries in Washington, DC, as part of a new pilot program launched in partnership with the District Department of Transportation (DDOT). The ten-month initiative, called “MicroFreight DC,” will see Amazon Delivery Service Partners making neighborhood

global.title: Sennebogen shows off electric, autonomous material handler
global.summary: German equipment brand Sennebogen recently demonstrated a semi-autonomous material handling solution that combines an electric wheeled excavator, mobile battery, and a mobile shredder to improve throughput and efficiency in European recycling plants. more…

global.title: Fisker went bankrupt and owners built open source car company from the ashes
global.summary: When Fisker Inc. filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in June 2024, it left roughly 11,000 Ocean SUV owners holding the keys to vehicles that cost them anywhere from $40,000 to $70,000 — and that were rapidly losing the software brains that made them work. No more over-the-air updates. No more connected

global.title: Tesla (TSLA) raises Model Y prices by up to $1,000 — first increase in two years
global.summary: Tesla has increased Model Y prices in the US by up to $1,000 across its Premium and Performance trims. It marks the first price increase on the Model Y in two years. The move ends a prolonged period of aggressive price cuts that defined Tesla’s strategy throughout 2024 and 2025, signaling a potentia

global.title: Another African country targets fossil-free electric transit by 2030
global.summary: The African nation of Uganda has announced a new National E-Mobility Strategy that it hopes will energize its manufacturing sector by transitioning the country’s public transit sector fully away from fossil fuels by 2030. more…

global.title: E-quipment highlight: Milwaukee brings big electric power to any job site
global.summary: Every job site needs to power to do work. Cordless hand tool brand Milwaukee knows that better than most, which is why the Big Red Truck is about to roll out with not one but two new products ready to bring big electric power to any job site. more…

global.title: Segway’s wild new 60 MPH electric dirt bike is now officially on sale
global.summary: Segway’s new Xaber 300 electric dirt bike is officially available for purchase starting today, with the company also confirming that the bike is now arriving at authorized dealers around the US. global.title: Podcast: Tesla Robotaxi, Rivian R2 configurator is live, China is taking over EU factories, and more
global.summary: In the Electrek Podcast, we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy.
